name: hanu-ji
description: Personal AI Agent - Telegram + WhatsApp + Google Calendar

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/agent-service && npm install --prefix services/webhook-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/agent-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/webhook-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix services/api-gateway && npm run build --prefix services/agent-service && npm run build --prefix services/webhook-service && npm run build --prefix frontend
